rows.query: those with lifetime suicidal thoughts had more than three times the odds, compared with those who never had suicidal thoughts.
rows.code:
rows = find_rows("self-reported-physician-diagnosed mood and/or anxiety disorder(s) > yes", "drug use > yes")
result = cell(rows.iloc[0], "fold-change")
print(result)

rows.query: miami gardens in florida is one of the largest u.s. cities with an african american population.
for females found guilty in ipv cases, probation was more often considered.

ipv_probation = cell("intimate partner violence (ipv) cases", "probation")
ipv_custody = cell("intimate partner violence (ipv) cases", "custody")

if ipv_probation > ipv_custody:
    result = "True"
else:
    result = "False"
    
print(result)
